name: Standing Giraffe
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a tall friendly giraffe standing in profile on four long slender legs, a very long neck held upright, two short knobby horns on top of its head, a patchwork pattern of rounded patches across its body, a tufted tail, and a gentle smile

name: Cute Baby Giraffe
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: an adorable baby giraffe with a big head, large sparkly eyes and long eyelashes, wobbly knobby-kneed legs, a short stubby neck, little rounded horns, and a few large simple patches, looking sweet and curious

name: Giraffe Face Close-Up
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a close-up portrait of a giraffe's face and upper neck filling the frame, big gentle eyes with long lashes, two knobby horns, large rounded ears, a soft muzzle with a smile, and a few patches along the neck

name: Mother and Baby Giraffe
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a tall mother giraffe lowering her long neck to nuzzle her small baby giraffe standing beside her, both with patchwork patterns and gentle loving faces, a few blades of grass at their feet

name: Giraffe Eating Leaves
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a giraffe stretching its long neck up to nibble leaves from the flat top of a tall acacia tree, tongue reaching toward a leafy branch, body covered in rounded patches, long legs planted on the ground

name: Running Giraffe
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a giraffe galloping across the savanna with legs stretched out mid-stride, neck leaning forward, tail flying behind, a happy expression, and a patchwork coat suggesting speed and motion

name: Giraffe Drinking Water
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a giraffe with its front legs splayed wide and long neck bent all the way down to sip from a small waterhole, ripples on the water surface, a few reeds and pebbles at the edge

name: Giraffe and Zebra Friends
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a tall spotted giraffe standing beside a striped zebra friend, both facing forward with cheerful smiles, a small acacia tree and a few clumps of grass behind them on the savanna

name: Giraffe Under the Sun
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a happy giraffe standing tall on a grassy plain, a round smiling sun and a few fluffy clouds in the sky above, scattered tufts of grass and a small bush at its feet, simple and cheerful

name: Sitting Baby Giraffe
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a chubby baby giraffe resting on the ground with its long legs folded underneath, neck curved softly to one side, big happy eyes, tiny horns, and a few simple large patches, looking cozy and content

name: Two Giraffes Crossing Necks
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: two friendly giraffes standing side by side with their long necks gently crossing in an X shape, both heads turned toward each other with warm smiles, patchwork coats and tufted tails

name: Giraffe with Birds
subject: animals/giraffe
prompt: a calm giraffe standing tall with two small oxpecker birds perched on its back and neck, head turned slightly to look at them, a butterfly fluttering nearby, and a few patches of savanna grass below
